{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005545C53E41260DE0C9829388"}"},"total":48},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7508444812253922110","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前面看得出文笔稚嫩，现在可以说相当丝滑，脉络清晰明了，剧情丰富多彩，文笔流畅，写的那个懂得都懂，总之，是一部越嚼越有劲的小说，值得一看，加油加油[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748269192,"group_id":"7453854455113468990","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N10yTQIqCIkgv1UvB4LsGTDLzPKLtGZrmV+Iiciwlr+O","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4033446053427853","user_name":"用户40334460"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4033446053427853","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718480328,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7453854455113468990","book_info":{"abstract":"[双男]+[系统]+[furry]+[异世穿越]+[双强]+[搞笑轻松]+[1V1]+[双洁]+[HE]+[慢节奏]
   龙兽人X狮兽人
   死后被游魂界消磨记忆的艾维斯•格兰瑞特被系统带到异世界，并且开始异世旅途。
   【作者有话说】：咳、咳，就是本人是福瑞控啦，然后番茄上福瑞的书也不多，有些还没CP可以磕。所以作为磕学家要学会自给自足，自己动手丰衣足食，放心磕，真的甜。
   如果不甜请见谅，作者第一本书也是第一次写小说。
   还有封面就是纯封面，不涉及书中人物。
